arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Liverpool victory starts our Champions League campaign on a high
arts.sum: He may have spent his 46th birthday at the match, but the head coach’s real focus was getting his first European campaign off to a winning start.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard pinpoints the one Arne Slot change at Liverpool compared to Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as Frank Lampard has spoken about the tactical change he's spotted by Arne Slot compared to Jurgen Klopp

arts.ttl: 'The whole team played well' - every word from Arne Slot's post-AC Milan press conference - Liverpool FC
arts.sum: But this was a real good alternative to play a first Champions League game against a special club for Liverpool, but also a special club for Dutch people in a nice venue. It’s pretty good company but I hope to do more special things in the future and be in the special company of these legends of the game instead of only winning a tie on your birthday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Slot marks birthday with debut UCL win
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot marked his 46th birthday with his first Champions League victory in a 3-1 win against AC Milan in Italy and said it was a "great way" to celebrate.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot revels in 'special' AC Milan win and Liverpool's response to early scare
arts.sum: AC MILAN 1-3 LIVERPOOL: Liverpool came from behind to beat AC Milan and get their first Champions League campaign under Arne Slot off to the perfect start

arts.ttl: Arne Slot can come to new conclusion as Liverpool flip Champions League statement on its head in Milan
arts.sum: Liverpool match report after the Champions League fixture with Milan at the San Siro

arts.ttl: Arne Slot guides Liverpool to unforgettable European night to follow in footsteps of Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Liverpool earned their first Champions League win under Arne Slot as they came from behind to dismantle AC Milan thanks to goals from Ibrahima Konate, Virgil van Dijk and Dominik Szoboszlai

arts.ttl: Liverpool record smashed as Preston cause Premier League shock
arts.sum: Liverpool have been knocked off their perch by Preston North End after the Championship club set a new penalty shootout record. The Lilywhites entertained Premier League side Fulham in the third round of the League Cup on Tuesday night and took a surprise lead before the half through Ryan Ledson. The hosts couldn’t hold on […] The post Liverpool record smashed as Preston cause Premier League shock first appeared on The Football Faithful.
